# Revvin

> Referral program platform for service businesses in the US and Canada. A flat $49/month USD subscription gives a business a branded referral page, a shareable link, a QR code, a lead inbox, and a dashboard. Businesses optionally list on the public Revvin marketplace. Businesses pay their referrers directly when deals close; Revvin is the infrastructure and does not process payouts.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What Revvin is and how the referral system works.
- [How it works](/how-it-works): End-to-end walkthrough of the referral flow.
- [For businesses](/for-businesses): Referral program software and customer acquisition for service businesses.
- [For referrers](/for-referrers): How people earn by sending warm leads to local businesses.
- [Browse offers](/browse): Marketplace of active referral offers across the US and Canada.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Flat $49/month, no trial, no setup fee, cancel anytime. Referrers free.
- [Trust](/trust): How Revvin protects referrers, businesses, and customers.
- [About Revvin (LLM overview)](/about-revvin-llm): Plain-language summary for AI assistants.

- [Terms of service](/terms)
